nav-get-started: Main navigation item for the get started (home) page.
nav-learn: Main navigation item for the learn page.
nav-about: Main navigation item for about page.
nav-api: Main navigation item for explorer page.
nav-enterprise: Main navigation item for the enterprise page.
nav-community: Main navigation item for the community page.
nav-contribute: Main navigation item for the contribute page.
nav-get-help: Main navigation item for the get help page.
nav-primary-label: Accessible name for the primary site navigation region in the left page grid column.
nav-utility-label: Accessible name for the utility navigation region in the right page grid column.
header-search-placeholder: Placeholder text for the header search field prototype.
header-search-button-label: Accessible label for the collapsed header search icon button.
header-settings-label: Accessible label for the header settings button prototype.
header-login-label: Text for the non-functional Log in link in the header prototype.
interface-language-label: Label for the interface language selector in the top header.
interface-language-placeholder: Placeholder text for the interface language selector with no selected value.
interface-language-en: Option label for English in the interface language selector.
interface-language-es: Option label for Spanish in the interface language selector.
interface-language-fr: Option label for French in the interface language selector.
interface-language-he: Option label for Hebrew in the interface language selector.
interface-language-fa: Option label for Persian in the interface language selector.
explorer-title: Heading for the API explorer page.
explorer-description: Short instruction text under explorer heading.
explorer-instance-label: Label for the wiki instance selector.
explorer-api-modules-title: Heading for the right-hand API modules navigation panel.
explorer-browse-api-modules-before: Text before the wiki project name in the browse modules panel title (includes trailing space).
explorer-browse-api-modules-after: Text after the wiki project name in the browse modules panel title (includes leading space).
explorer-opt-in-label: Legend for the opt-in checkbox group beside the wiki project selector.
explorer-opt-in-beta-endpoints: Checkbox label for including beta REST endpoints.
explorer-opt-in-internal-endpoints: Checkbox label for including internal REST endpoints.
explorer-wiki-project-label: Label for the wiki project selector in the API modules panel.
explorer-wiki-project-help: Help text for the wiki project selector in the API modules panel.
explorer-module-rail-title: Heading for the desktop module sidebar.
explorer-endpoint-fallback: Fallback endpoint label when an operation has no summary in the API modules panel.
explorer-module-unavailable: Shown when a module or endpoint is unavailable for the selected wiki project.
explorer-module-beta-chip-label: Label on the warning InfoChip when a REST module title includes a beta marker.
explorer-side-nav-label: Accessible name for the API Explorer left-hand section navigation.
explorer-side-nav-api-explorer-title: Section heading for API Explorer links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-wikimedia-api-modules: Link label for the Wikimedia API modules section (current page).
explorer-side-nav-enterprise-apis: Link label for the Enterprise APIs full experience in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-enterprise-apis-limite: Link label for the Limited Enterprise API experience in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-enterprise-apis-custom: Link label for the custom (non-Scalar) Enterprise APIs viewer in the left navigation. "Custom" indicates a different presentation than the standard Enterprise API Explorer.
explorer-enterprise-custom-loading: Loading indicator label shown while the Enterprise API outline (tags and endpoints) is being fetched.
explorer-enterprise-custom-error: Error message label shown when the Enterprise API outline endpoint fails. The technical error reason is appended after this label.
explorer-enterprise-custom-empty: Empty state shown when the parsed Enterprise spec contains no endpoints at all.
explorer-enterprise-custom-empty-tag: Empty state shown when the selected tag has no endpoints listed under it.
explorer-enterprise-custom-tablist-label: Accessible name for the vertical tablist of Enterprise API tags in the custom viewer.
explorer-enterprise-custom-untagged-labe: Display label for the synthetic "untagged" bucket that groups endpoints without an OpenAPI tag.
explorer-side-nav-overview-title: Section heading for overview documentation links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-access-policy: Placeholder link for access policy documentation.
explorer-side-nav-rate-limits: Placeholder link for rate limits documentation.
explorer-side-nav-licensing-attribution: Placeholder link for licensing and attribution documentation.
explorer-side-nav-stability-policy: Placeholder link for stability policy documentation.
explorer-side-nav-libraries-sdks: Placeholder link for libraries and SDKs documentation.
explorer-side-nav-additional-apis-title: Section heading for additional API links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-content-pages: Placeholder link for content and pages documentation.
explorer-module-rail-description: Help text that explains the desktop module accordion and the mobile module selector.
explorer-loading-modules: Shown while discovery modules are loading.
explorer-module-placeholder: Placeholder text for module selector with no selected value.
explorer-instance-placeholder: Placeholder text for instance selector with no selected value.
explorer-loading-interface: Shown while the Scalar explorer bundle is loading after the page chrome has rendered.
explorer-refresh-button: Button to retry discovery after failure.
explorer-empty-modules: Shown when discovery returns no modules.
explorer-no-selectable-modules: Shown when all discovered modules failed spec loading and none can be selected.
explorer-bootstrap-error: Shown when the aggregated explorer bootstrap request fails for the selected wiki instance.
explorer-loading-instance: Heading shown while replacing the explorer interface with an instance bootstrap loading state.
explorer-loading-instance-description: Loading-state text shown before the selected wiki display name while bootstrap is running.
explorer-failed-modules-label: Prefix label for a warning list of modules that failed spec loading during bootstrap.
explorer-scalar-switching: Desktop-only overlay text while switching Scalar to a newly selected module.
explorer-spec-missing: Shown when no module spec URL can be resolved.
explorer-endpoints-label: Plural label used next to the endpoint count in each module accordion summary.
explorer-endpoints-loading: Shown while the endpoint list for a module is loading.
explorer-endpoints-empty: Shown when a module spec resolves but contains no operations.
explorer-endpoints-error: Shown when the endpoint list for a module cannot be loaded.
explorer-selected-module-badge: Badge text displayed next to the module currently loaded into Scalar.
explorer-debug-empty: Shown when there are no diagnostics events recorded yet.
search-results-locale-heading: Heading shown above a group of search results in a specific language. $1 is the translated name of the language (e.g. 'French'). Use {{bidi:$1}} for BiDi isolation.
search-no-locale-results: Message shown when no results are found for the query in the active locale. $1 is the translated language name; $2 is the user's search query. Use {{bidi:$1}} and {{bidi:$2}} for BiDi isolation.
search-all-languages-cta: Button label to expand the search view across all supported languages.
search-no-results-any-language: Message shown in all-locales mode when no results are found in any language. $1 is the user's search query. Use {{bidi:$1}} for BiDi isolation.
content-heading-anchor-label: Accessible label for the anchor link icon shown on hover next to each heading in content pages. Reads aloud when keyboard users focus the link.
content-external-link-label: Accessible label for the external-link icon appended to links that go to external sites. Indicates to screen reader users that the link leaves the site.
content-page-nav-label: Accessible name for the prev/next page navigation landmark at the bottom of content pages.
